machine.name: Community Microgrid Cluster Preventive Maintenance Work Order Availability Monitor
machine.description: New energy domain machine for operational monitoring and control of a community microgrid cluster. It focuses on preventive maintenance work order availability monitor, including solar production, battery storage behavior, feeder state, local grid electric quality/stability, and preventive-maintenance readiness, and emits 4D operational outputs at [7220:7224].

metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.operationalFocus: Preventive Maintenance Work Order Availability Monitor
metadata.focusDescription: tracks uptime, telemetry freshness, capacity margin, and maintenance readiness for preventive maintenance work order with solar, battery storage, feeder, and preventive-maintenance context aligned to local grid electric quality and stability signals: voltage band, frequency band, harmonics, flicker, phase balance, PCC synchronization, feeder/protection state, and import/export constraints
agentActions: Dispatch community_microgrid_ops_agent for urgent stabilization of preventive maintenance work order availability monitor using local voltage, frequency, harmonic, phase-balance, PCC, and feeder/protection signals.
Optimize solar, battery, inverter grid-support, import/export, and flexible-load setpoints for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor.
Schedule preventive maintenance for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor when equipment drift threatens local electric quality, grid stability, or safety margins.
Continue community microgrid monitoring for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor while preserving the current local grid quality/stability operating plan.
inputSemantics: battery storage or flexible load margin
local grid electric quality and stability

sensorNormalization.solar_or_asset_health_norm: 0.0=faulted or unavailable; 0.5=watch band; 1.0=healthy and producing or ready
sensorNormalization.local_grid_electric_quality_stability_no: 0.0=local voltage, frequency, harmonic, phase, PCC, feeder, or protection signal is unsafe/out of tolerance; 0.5=watch band or constrained; 1.0=stable, synchronized, and inside local electric-quality limits
sensorNormalization.grid_or_power_quality_norm: Alias of local_grid_electric_quality_stability_norm retained for compatibility with earlier energy corpus drafts
sensorNormalization.maintenance_readiness_norm: 0.0=overdue or unsafe; 0.5=service due soon; 1.0=current and verified

governance.notes: Generated for the new energy community microgrid corpus. Review local interconnection, fire code, utility tariff, and maintenance procedures before production routing for ENX153.

triggerConfig.processName: Community Microgrid Cluster Preventive Maintenance Work Order Availability Monitor

rules.description: Urgent stabilization, isolation, curtailment, export limiting, grid-support, or restoration action required to protect local electric quality/stability.
Dispatch optimization should run for solar, battery, inverter grid-support, feeder constraints, local grid quality, and flexible load setpoints.
Preventive maintenance should be scheduled and verified before asset drift degrades local electric quality or stability.
Operating window is stable and local grid electric quality signals are inside limits.

localGridElectricQualityStabilitySignals.description: Aggregates local distribution-grid electric quality and stability telemetry used for microgrid control decisions.
telemetry: frequency deviation and rate-of-change-of-frequency watch state
harmonic distortion and flicker watch state
PCC synchronization and islanding permissive state
feeder loading, breaker, recloser, and sectionalizer state
protection relay health and fault-current availability
reverse-power, import/export limit, and utility curtailment constraint
controlUses: Volt/VAR and inverter reactive-power setpoint selection
export limiting and feeder congestion relief
island-ready, islanded, and restoration mode gating
preventive maintenance prioritization for assets degrading grid quality

allowedActions: Dispatch community_microgrid_ops_agent for urgent stabilization of preventive maintenance work order availability monitor using local voltage, frequency, harmonic, phase-balance, PCC, and feeder/protection signals.
Optimize solar, battery, inverter grid-support, import/export, and flexible-load setpoints for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor.
Schedule preventive maintenance for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor when equipment drift threatens local electric quality, grid stability, or safety margins.
Continue community microgrid monitoring for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor while preserving the current local grid quality/stability operating plan.

sequences.name: Preventive Maintenance Work Order Availability Monitor: NORMAL -> WATCH -> CRITICAL -> URGENT_STABILIZE

metadata.description: Urgent stabilization or protective control required for the community microgrid cluster using local grid electric quality/stability signals.

metadata.name: NORMAL
metadata.description: Solar, storage, local grid electric quality, and maintenance signals are inside the operating band.

metadata.name: WATCH
metadata.description: Storage or flexibility margin is weakening while voltage, frequency, harmonic, and phase-balance stability remain serviceable.

metadata.name: CRITICAL
metadata.description: Generation, local grid quality, or maintenance readiness has degraded enough to threaten the cluster operating plan.

metadata.name: URGENT
metadata.description: Immediate stabilization, curtailment, islanding, export limiting, or service isolation is required to protect local grid stability.
Urgent stabilization or protective control required
metadata.action: Dispatch community_microgrid_ops_agent to stabilize preventive maintenance work order availability monitor, protect residents, critical loads, and local grid electric quality, and record corrective action.

sequences.name: Preventive Maintenance Work Order Availability Monitor: FORECAST -> HEADROOM -> SETPOINT -> OPTIMIZE_DISPATCH

metadata.description: Dispatch optimization should run for the community microgrid cluster using local grid electric quality/stability signals.

metadata.name: FORECAST_READY
metadata.description: Forecasts, tariff context, voltage/frequency bands, harmonic limits, and feeder constraints are available for the next operating window.

metadata.name: HEADROOM_FOUND
metadata.description: Solar or storage headroom is available, but local voltage stability, frequency response, or feeder loading needs coordination.

metadata.name: SETPOINT_READY
metadata.description: Candidate inverter, battery, Volt/VAR, frequency-watt, export-limit, or flexible-load setpoints are ready for execution.

metadata.name: OPTIMIZE
metadata.description: Optimization should dispatch before avoidable curtailment, peak import, voltage excursion, harmonic issue, frequency instability, or reserve loss appears.
Dispatch optimization should run
metadata.action: Run solar and battery dispatch optimization for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor using tariff, forecast, community load, voltage, frequency, harmonic, and feeder constraint signals.

sequences.name: Preventive Maintenance Work Order Availability Monitor: BASELINE -> DRIFT -> SERVICE_DUE -> PREVENTIVE_MAINTENANCE

metadata.description: Preventive maintenance required for the community microgrid cluster using local grid electric quality/stability signals.

metadata.name: BASELINE
metadata.description: The asset is operating, while local grid quality and maintenance telemetry are being tracked closely.

metadata.name: DRIFT
metadata.description: A performance, voltage, frequency, harmonic, phase-balance, thermal, alarm, or inspection indicator has drifted from baseline.

metadata.name: SERVICE_DUE
metadata.description: Maintenance readiness and local grid stability confidence indicate service should be scheduled.

metadata.name: MAINTAIN
metadata.description: Preventive maintenance should be dispatched before reliability, protection, safety, or local electric-quality margins erode.
Preventive maintenance required
metadata.action: Create preventive-maintenance work for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor and verify post-service telemetry and local electric-quality recovery.

sequences.name: Preventive Maintenance Work Order Availability Monitor: SAMPLE -> VALIDATE -> CONFIRM -> OPERATING_WINDOW_OK

metadata.description: Operating window is stable for the community microgrid cluster using local grid electric quality/stability signals.

metadata.name: SAMPLE
metadata.description: Telemetry samples are fresh and the control window includes current local grid quality readings.

metadata.name: VALIDATE
metadata.description: Forecast, tariff, voltage/frequency, harmonic, grid-synchronization, and state-of-charge assumptions remain consistent.

metadata.name: CONFIRM
metadata.description: The cluster has enough solar, storage, load-flexibility, and local grid electric-quality confidence for steady operation.

metadata.name: NOMINAL
metadata.description: The monitored window is stable and no dispatch or maintenance action is required.
Operating window is stable
metadata.action: Continue automated monitoring for preventive maintenance work order availability monitor while preserving current grid-support and dispatch setpoints.

inputSequences.name: Urgent
inputSequences.description: Urgent stabilization or protective control required for the community microgrid cluster. Local grid electric quality/stability is evaluated in the third 4D lane.

inputSequences.name: Optimize
inputSequences.description: Dispatch optimization should run for the community microgrid cluster. Local grid electric quality/stability is evaluated in the third 4D lane.

inputSequences.name: Maintain
inputSequences.description: Preventive maintenance required for the community microgrid cluster. Local grid electric quality/stability is evaluated in the third 4D lane.

inputSequences.name: Nominal
inputSequences.description: Operating window is stable for the community microgrid cluster. Local grid electric quality/stability is evaluated in the third 4D lane.
